Cât durează analiza?: How long does the analysis take?
Sub 60 de secunde pentru un deck standar: Under 60 seconds for a standard deck of 10–15 slides. Longer decks (up to 40 slides) take 2–3 minutes.
Pitch deck-ul meu rămâne privat?: Does my pitch deck remain private?
Da. Fișierul tău este stocat criptat, ac: Yes. Your file is stored encrypted, accessible only from your account. We do not share it with investors or partners without your explicit consent.
Pot reîncărca o versiune îmbunătățită?: Can I re-upload an improved version?
Da. Fiecare upload generează un raport n: Yes. Each upload generates a new report. You can compare them in the dashboard to see your progress.
Funcționează pentru pitch deck-uri în en: Does it work for pitch decks in English?
Da. Modelul analizează deck-uri în român: Yes. The model analyzes decks in Romanian, English, Russian, and Ukrainian. Recommendations are delivered in the language of your account.
Ce e diferit față de un audit uman?: What is different from a human audit?
AI-ul detectează lipsuri structurale și: AI detects structural gaps and benchmarks against thousands of funded pitch decks. For an expert human audit, we offer separate 1:1 sessions.
Sistemul transcrie automat video-ul, ana: The system automatically transcribes the video, analyzes pace, clarity, narrative structure, and emotional impact. It identifies moments when you lose the evaluator's attention and suggests concrete storytelling adjustments. You receive a confidence score, an editable transcript, and an optimized version of the script for a more compelling pitch.
MP4 sau MOV · max 200 MB · până la 3 min: MP4 or MOV · max 200 MB · up to 3 minutes
Cât de lung poate fi video-ul?: How long can the video be?
Recomandăm 90 secunde – 3 minute. Video-: We recommend 90 seconds – 3 minutes. Videos longer than 3 minutes are accepted but the analysis focuses on the first 3 minutes.
Ce calitate audio trebuie?: What audio quality do I need?
Orice nivel decent — microfon de telefon: Any decent level — a phone microphone is enough. We just avoid loud background noise or music over the vocals.
Care e dimensiunea maximă a fișierului?: What is the maximum file size?
Până la 200 MB pentru MP4/MOV. Pentru fi: Up to 200 MB for MP4/MOV. For larger files, use link upload (Drive/Vimeo) — coming soon.
Analizezi și limbajul corporal?: Do you also analyze body language?
Pentru moment, ne concentrăm pe audio și: For now, we're focusing on audio and spoken content. Visual expressiveness analysis is coming in Q3.
Pot folosi raportul pentru a-mi pregăti: Can I use the report to prepare a live pitch?
Da. Recomandările de timing, accentuare: Yes. The timing, emphasis, and optimized transcript recommendations are directly applicable to a demo day presentation.
Ce tip de whitepaper analizezi?: What type of whitepaper are you analyzing?
Whitepaper-uri tehnice (1–30 pagini): me: Technical whitepapers (1–30 pages): research methodology, product/technology description, business case, market analysis for deep tech.
Da, dar nu căutăm prior art (nu suntem p: Yes, but we do not search for prior art (we are not patent searchers). We check if the IP positioning in the whitepaper is coherent and complete.
Cât de detaliată e estimarea TRL?: How detailed is the TRL estimate?
Folosim scala 1–9 EU, cu justificare per: We use the 1–9 EU scale, with justification per criterion and the difference from the minimum TRL required by major programs.
E util și pentru spinout-uri academice?: Is it also useful for academic spinouts?
Da, în special. Acoperim întreaga tranzi: Yes, specifically. We cover the entire transition from published research to commercial proposal.
Pot încărca și articole publicate în rev: Can I also upload articles published in magazines?
Da, dar recomandăm să încarci documentul: Yes, but we recommend uploading the internal technical document, not just the publication — published versions are often reduced for space.
Orice artefact tehnic — PDF, DOCX, PPTX: Any technical artifact — PDF, DOCX, PPTX · max 25 MB
Am nevoie să încarc ceva nou?: Do I need to upload something new?
Nu obligatoriu. Dacă ai uploads anterioa: Not mandatory. If you have previous uploads (pitch deck, whitepaper), we use those. You can add an additional technical document if you want a more precise estimate.
Comparăm semnalele extrase din documente: We compare the signals extracted from your documents with the official European Commission definitions for each TRL. We justify each point with quotes from your document.
Diferă scala TRL între programe?: Does the TRL scale differ between programs?
Da. Scala UE (1–9) e standard, dar inter: Yes. The EU scale (1–9) is standard, but interpretation varies — EIC is stricter on commercial validation, ARC is stricter on scientific rigor. Our report goes into detail.
Estimezi și TRL pentru servicii software: Do you also estimate TRL for software as a service (SaaS)?
Da. Folosim definiția adaptată pentru so: Yes. We use the definition adapted for software/digital, where TRL 7+ means deployment in production with real users.
Pot să urc de la TRL 4 la 7 în 6 luni?: Can I go from TRL 4 to 7 in 6 months?
Posibil dar rar — depinde de pivot, vali: Possible but rare — depends on pivot, market validations, and budget. The report provides you with a roadmap with clear milestones.
Completează formularul — fără upload: Fill out the form — no upload
E necesar să am parteneri înainte să apl: Do I need to have partners before applying?
Pentru majoritatea programelor colaborat: For most collaborative programs — yes. We recommend forming the consortium 6–9 months before the deadline.
Cât costă să găsești parteneri?: How much does it cost to find partners?
Recomandările de bază sunt gratuite. Pen: Basic referrals are free. For introductions facilitated through eligibil.org, we offer a separate plan.
Acoperiți și parteneri din afara UE?: Do you also cover partners outside the EU?
Da. Pentru programe ca Horizon Europe As: Yes. For programs like Horizon Europe Associated Countries, we include partners from Moldova, Ukraine, Turkey, UK, Israel, etc.
Ce e un \"RTO\" și de ce am nevoie de un: What is an "RTO" and why do I need one?
Research and Technology Organization (Fr: Research and Technology Organization (Fraunhofer, TNO, CEA, …). Most R&D grants require at least one RTO or university as a partner with scientific credibility.
Pot lista propriul startup pentru ca alț: Can I list my own startup so others can find me?
Da. Înregistrează-te și marchează profil: Yes. Register and mark your profile as "open to consortia" — you will appear in other applicants' recommendations.
Timeout — analiza durează prea mult. Ver: Timeout — analysis is taking too long. Check in the dashboard.
Notă: scoruri stub — analiza completă AI: Note: stub scores — full AI analysis will resume when we pay out the credits.
Descrierea produsului, avantaje, FAQ și: Product description, benefits, FAQ and document upload. AI analysis for pitch deck, video pitch, whitepaper, TRL assessment or consortium identification.
ex: Universitatea Tehnică din Moldova, f: ex: Technical University of Moldova, our technical founder, …
nu corespunde niciunui produs activ. Vez: does not correspond to any active product. See
Ce primești în raport: What do you get in the report?
Trage fișierul aici sau apasă pentru a s: Drag the file here or click to select
Thank you — we receive the data.
